tagged_types.name: ControllerSubclass
tagged_types.code: TYPE ControllerSubclass IS NEW GPIB.ControllerInterface WITH PRIVATE;

subprograms.name: Get
subprograms.code: FUNCTION Get(Self : IN OUT ControllerSubclass) RETURN String

subprograms.name: Initialize
subprograms.code: PROCEDURE Initialize(Self : OUT ControllerSubclass; name : String)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: PROCEDURE Put(Self : IN OUT ControllerSubclass; cmd : String)

subprograms.name: SelectSlave
subprograms.code: PROCEDURE SelectSlave(Self : IN OUT ControllerSubclass; slave : GPIB.Address)
